description: Your organization is at risk of exceeding its Splunk ingestion license quota. Using the Splunk Enterprise web interface (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!), build proactive monitoring for data ingestion volume using Splunk's internal metrics. Create a Saved Search / Alert named 'High_License_Usage_Warning' that queries internal metrics (index=_internal) to aggregate total volume from the 'kb' field in metrics.log and alerts if the volume exceeds 1000. Additionally, create a dashboard in the Search & Reporting app named 'License_Consumption_Audit' featuring two visualizations: one showing volume by index (group="per_index_thruput", aggregating 'kb' by 'series') and another showing volume by sourcetype (group="per_sourcetype_thruput", aggregating 'kb' by 'series').
